description: It represents an interdisciplinary approach to education that integrates these four subjects into a cohesive learning experience based on real-world applications.
It prepares students for careers in business, finance, and management by combining theoretical knowledge with practical applications in real-world business scenarios.

It prepares students for careers in communication, education, politics, and social services by developing critical thinking, research, and analytical skills through real-world social and cultural studies.

strandName: Front Office, Tourism Promotion, Local Tour Guiding, Housekeeping
description: It equips students with skills in customer service, travel planning, tour operations, and hotel management, preparing them for careers in the tourism and hospitality industry through hands-on training and real-world applications.

It equips students with technical skills in engine diagnostics, electrical systems, and mechanical repairs, preparing them for careers in the automotive industry through hands-on training and real-world applications.

strandName: Cookery, Bread and Pastry Production, Food and Beverage Services
description: They equip students with skills in food preparation, baking, and restaurant service, preparing them for careers in the food and hospitality industry through hands-on training and real-world applications.

It equips students with technical skills in wiring, troubleshooting, and safety protocols, preparing them for careers in the electrical and construction industries through hands-on training and real-world applications.
